key_data.description: Immutable. Public half of the asymmetric key. Structure is [documented below](#nested_key_data).

not_before_time.description: (Output) Earliest timestamp when this key is valid. Attempts to use this key before this time will fail. Only present if the key data represents a X.509 certificate. Uses RFC 3339, where generated output will always be Z-normalized and uses 0, 3, 6 or 9 fractional digits. Offsets other than "Z" are also accepted. Examples: "2014-10-02T15:01:23Z", "2014-10-02T15:01:23.045123456Z" or "2014-10-02T15:01:23+05:30".

not_after_time.description: (Output) Latest timestamp when this key is valid. Attempts to use this key after this time will fail. Only present if the key data represents a X.509 certificate. Uses RFC 3339, where generated output will always be Z-normalized and uses 0, 3, 6 or 9 fractional digits. Offsets other than "Z" are also accepted. Examples: "2014-10-02T15:01:23Z", "2014-10-02T15:01:23.045123456Z" or "2014-10-02T15:01:23+05:30".

key.description: (Output) The key data. The format of the key is represented by the format field.

key_spec.description: The specifications for the key. Possible values are: `RSA_2048`, `RSA_3072`, `RSA_4096`.

use.description: The purpose of the key. Possible values are: `ENCRYPTION`.

workforce_pool_id.description: The ID of the workforce pool.

key_id.description: The ID to use for the key, which becomes the final component of the resource name. This value must be 4-32 characters, and may contain the characters [a-z0-9-].
